creator: sheldonh@iafrica.com
text:
Hi,

Would whomever commits this please also hand over MAINTAINERship to me,
as per the attached request from the current MAINTAINER. Please use the
following:

MAINTAINER=	sheldonh@iafrica.com

Thanks,
Sheldon.

------- Forwarded Message

Replied: Tue, 02 Mar 1999 12:53:39 +0200
Replied: Brian Handy <handy@lambic.physics.montana.edu>

	id 10HgMm-0000Hn-00
	for sheldonh@axl.noc.iafrica.com; Tue, 2 Mar 1999 06:01:08 +0200

	(envelope-from handy@lambic.physics.montana.edu)
Date: Mon, 1 Mar 1999 21:00:53 -0700 (MST)
From: Brian Handy <handy@lambic.physics.montana.edu>
To: Sheldon Hearn <sheldonh@iafrica.com>
Subject: Re: ports/10260: [PATCH] Upgrade sysutils/xosview to 1.7.0
In-Reply-To: <84066.920024323@axl.noc.iafrica.com>
Message-ID: <Pine.BSF.4.05.9903012059280.111-100000@lambic.physics.montana.edu>
X-files: The truth is out there
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: TEXT/PLAIN; charset=US-ASCII

Hi Sheldon!

I saw your port, looks great to me, thanks for taking the lead on this.
(You could take the MAINTAINER slot too if you desired; my interests and
time seem to be elsewhere right now.)  I've copied 1.7.0 over to my
machine as the secondary MASTER_SITE as well.

Happy trails!


Brian



------- End of Forwarded Message
